title: 💻 Best Practices for Maximizing Claude Code Performance - Medium
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

Anthropic’s Claude Code is more than just a code completion tool; it’s an “agentic” development partner with direct access to your shell and file system, capable of performing tasks autonomously. When a session starts, Claude Code automatically checks for a `CLAUDE.md` file in your project's root directory. # Project Guidelines for Claude Code. You can encapsulate complex, repetitive workflows into powerful commands shared across your team by creating markdown files in the `.claude/commands` directory. *   **Example Custom Command (**`.claude/commands/new-feature.md`**):**Now, any team member can just type `/new-feature` in the terminal to have Claude execute these steps. 2.   **Claude:** (Generates the test code.). *   Set up a hook that runs Claude in headless mode on every commit attempt to automatically add documentation to any new functions in the staged files. *   `claude code --headless "Add JSDoc comments to all new functions in the staged files."`. The keys to success are providing clear project knowledge (`CLAUDE.md`), automating repetitive tasks (slash commands), and approaching complex problems with proven workflows (Explore→Plan).

title: 💻 Claude Code Updates: Introducing /simplify and /batch Skills ...
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

Claude Code Updates: Introducing /simplify and /batch Skills, Enhanced UX, and More | daily.dev. Claude Code Updates: Introducing /simplify and /batch Skills, Enhanced UX, and More. Claude Code (New Updates): New SIMPLIFY & BATCH Skill Agents, Better UX, New Commands & MORE! Claude Code received several notable updates including two new skill agents: /simplify and /batch. The /simplify command uses parallel agents to improve code quality, tune performance, and enforce claude.md compliance after changes are made. The /batch command enables large-scale code migrations by running dozens of isolated agents in parallel using git worktrees, each handling its own files and submitting PRs. Additional updates include a new /copy command to copy the last Claude response to clipboard, markdown rendering in the ask-user-question tool for visual option previews, and HTTP hook handlers that allow integrating Claude Code with external services for validation, logging, or CI pipeline triggers. Claude Code is getting two new Skills in its next version: /simplify and /batch.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch API Complete Guide - SmartScope
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

#!/bin/bash# parallel_processing.sh # Implement parallel processing()  { local  file = " $1 "  local  output_dir = " $2 "  echo  "Processing: $file "    "Optimize this code for performance"   " $file "   " $output_dir/$( " $file ") "} # Execute in parallel export      "*.py"  |    4   {}  echo  "✅ Parallel processing completed". #!/bin/bash# robust_processing.sh set    # Stop on error # Log configuration LOG_FILE ="claude_batch.log" exec  1  (  " $LOG_FILE ") exec  2  (  " $LOG_FILE "  & 2) # Error handling function()  { local  line_number = " $1 "  echo  "❌ Error occurred at line: $line_number "  echo  "📝 Check log file: $LOG_FILE "  exit  1} trap  'handle_error $LINENO'  # Process execution()  { local  max_retries = 3  local  retry_count = 0  while  ;  do  if    "Process these files"   300     ;  then  echo  "✅ Processing completed successfully"  return  0  else  (())  echo  "⚠️ Attempt $retry_count failed, retrying..."   5  fi  done  echo  "❌ Processing failed after $max_retries  attempts"  return  1} # Main processing()  { echo  "🚀 Starting batch processing..."  # Pre-processing  if  ;  then  echo  "❌ Input file not found"  exit  1  fi  # Execute processing   # Post-processing  if  ;  then  echo  "✅ Batch processing completed successfully"  else  echo  "❌ Output file is empty or missing"  exit  1  fi}  " $@ ".

title: 💻 Claude Code: Batch Process Prompts with Anthropic Claude API
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Batch process prompts with Anthropic Claude API. This workflow template provides a robust solution for efficiently sending multiple prompts to Anthropic's Claude models in a single batch request and retrieving the results. 2. **An Example Usage Workflow:** A separate branch demonstrating how to prepare data and trigger the core workflow, including examples using simple strings and n8n's Langchain Chat Memory nodes. * `requests` (JSON array, where each object represents a single prompt request conforming to the Anthropic Batch API schema). Refer to the **Sticky Notes** in the template and the Anthropic Batch API documentation for the exact schema required within the `requests` array. You will build *another* workflow that prepares the `anthropic-version` and `requests` array and then uses the 'Execute Workflow' node to trigger this template. * **Output Processing:** In the workflow that *calls* this template, add nodes after the 'Execute Workflow' node to process the individual result items returned (e.g., save to a database, spreadsheet, send notifications).
